sentences.text: But I did not realize Jasmine was actually in a Budget camp, and so she is not able to attend.
So what I would like to ask is, if we could.
Re, I just don't want to send you a note, because I thought that would be rude to say, Oh, by the way, so could we reschedule this for Friday and do it for 4 30, central, which is 2, 30, Pacific.
And, as I said, I apologize.
